recommendations.title: Moonage Daydream
recommendations.overview: A cinematic odyssey featuring never-before-seen footage exploring David Bowie's creative and musical journey.

recommendations.title: X-Rated: The Greatest Adult Movies of All Time

recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: What Happened, Miss Simone?
recommendations.overview: The film chronicles Nina Simone's journey from child piano prodigy to iconic musician and passionate activist, told in her own words.

recommendations.title: Wandering Stars
recommendations.overview: This film follows the making of Nekfeu's 3rd album, between Paris, Japan, Greece and the United States.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: The Curious Birth of Benjamin Button

recommendations.title: Quincy
recommendations.overview: An intimate look into the life of icon Quincy Jones. A unique force in music and popular culture for 70 years, Jones has transcended racial and cultural boundaries; his story is inextricably woven into the fabric of America.  Jones came to prominence

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: The Cutting Edge: The Magic of Movie Editing
recommendations.overview: Documentary about the art of film editing. Clips are shown from many groundbreaking films with innovative editing styles.
